summary: This is a legal-grade attorney-client privileged forensic briefing linking the Fullerton/Anaheim property shuffle, municipal cyber security negligence, and systemic PPP/RICO fraud. It includes deep dives into 213 N. Gilbert St (Gilbert Property Trust) and 632 N. East St (Covenant House California) property histories and the statistical correlation analysis (Pearson and Spearman) of exposed endpoints to RICO fraud amounts across 39 states.
